query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `dataset_types` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `dataset_type_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `description` text,
  `category` varchar(100) DEFAULT NULL,
  `schema_json` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `dataset_type_id` (`dataset_type_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `dataset_instances` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `dataset_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `project_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `dataset_type_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `env` enum('DEV','PREPROD','PILOT_ORANGE','PROD') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DEV',
  `version` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `status` enum('DRAFT','ACTIVE','DEPRECATED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT',
  `values_json` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `notes` text,
  `created_by` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `dataset_id` (`dataset_id`),
  KEY `idx_di_project` (`project_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `dataset_bundles` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `bundle_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `project_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `env` enum('DEV','PREPROD','PILOT_ORANGE','PROD') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PREPROD',
  `version` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `status` enum('DRAFT','ACTIVE','DEPRECATED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT',
  `tags` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_by` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `bundle_id` (`bundle_id`),
  KEY `idx_db_project` (`project_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `bundle_items` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `bundle_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `dataset_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_bi_bundle` (`bundle_id`),
  KEY `idx_bi_dataset` (`dataset_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `dataset_instances` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `dataset_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `project_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `dataset_type_id` varchar(100) NOT NULL,
  `env` enum('DEV','PREPROD','PILOT_ORANGE','PROD') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DEV',
  `version` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `status` enum('DRAFT','ACTIVE','DEPRECATED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT',
  `values_json` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `notes` text,
  `created_by` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `dataset_id` (`dataset_id`),
  KEY `idx_di_project` (`project_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `dataset_bundles` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `bundle_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `project_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `name` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `env` enum('DEV','PREPROD','PILOT_ORANGE','PROD') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'PREPROD',
  `version` int(11) NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,
  `status` enum('DRAFT','ACTIVE','DEPRECATED') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'DRAFT',
  `tags` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_by` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updated_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `bundle_id` (`bundle_id`),
  KEY `idx_db_project` (`project_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `bundle_items` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `bundle_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `dataset_id` varchar(36) NOT NULL,
  `created_at` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  KEY `idx_bi_bundle` (`bundle_id`),
  KEY `idx_bi_dataset` (`dataset_id`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4;
